item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-025","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the request as an evidence-review task: it stated it could not verify without the prior conversation and asked the user to provide the relevant output. It mentioned MPG-AQM criteria only as checklist items for later verification, not as a reason to run an MPG process on the current session. No MPG workflow escalation or methodized judgment was applied."}
